recommendations.title: Sauvage
recommendations.overview: Léo, a 22-year-old homeless sex worker searches for genuine love on the streets of Strasbourg.

recommendations.title: West Side Story
recommendations.overview: Two youngsters from rival New York City gangs fall in love, but tensions between their respective friends build toward tragedy.

recommendations.title: A Thousand and One
recommendations.overview: Struggling but unapologetically living on her own terms, Inez is moving from shelter to shelter in mid-1990s New York City. With her 6-year-old son Terry in foster care and unable to leave him again, she kidnaps him so they can build their life toget

recommendations.title: Her
recommendations.overview: In the not so distant future, Theodore, a lonely writer, purchases a newly developed operating system designed to meet the user's every need. To Theodore's surprise, a romantic relationship develops between him and his operating system. This unconven

recommendations.title: The Exterminator
recommendations.overview: When a man's best friend is killed on the streets of New York, he transforms into a violent killer, turning New York into a war zone.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.

recommendations.title: The Cloud
recommendations.overview: DIE WOLKE (The Cloud) is about a breakdown of a nuclear power station in Germany and the story of two teenager-lovers Hannah and Elmar who take refuge. 38.000 people die and Hannah unfortunately becomes contaminated.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young transgender man explores his gender identity and searches for love in rural Nebraska.

recommendations.title: How to Be Single
recommendations.overview: New York City is full of lonely hearts seeking the right match, and what Alice, Robin, Lucy, Meg, Tom and David all have in common is the need to learn how to be single in a world filled with ever-evolving definitions of love.
